/usr/bin/cc  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC -m64 -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/cdjpeg.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdbmp.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdgif.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdppm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdswitch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg-static.dir/src/rdtarga.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg12-static.dir/src/rdppm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/cjpeg16-static.dir/src/rdppm.c.o" -o cjpeg-static  libjpeg.a
